summary: Planning for retirement isn’t just about money, it’s about freedom, security, and peace of mind. In this in-depth conversation, Ajit Menon (CEO, PGIM Mutual Fund) shares 30 years of hard-earned investment wisdom to help you plan smarter, reduce anxiety, and build a financially free life.

seo.title: Ajit Menon Investment Strategy: 7 Ways to Build Wealth & Financial Freedom
seo.description: Planning for retirement isn’t just about money, it’s about freedom, security, and peace of mind. In this in-depth conversation, Ajit Menon (CEO, PGIM

takeaways: Ajit Menon, CEO of PGIM Mutual Fund, draws on 30 years of experience to argue that retirement planning is not only about money, it is about freedom, security, and peace of mind, and reframing it as financial freedom changes the decisions you make.
The 'happy versus happier' idea sits at the core of his philosophy: everyone can be happy, but the constant chase to be happier is where the trouble usually starts.

He breaks down all seven major asset classes, equity, bonds, gold, commodities, currency, real estate, and alternatives, and warns that concentrating in one asset while ignoring economic cycles is a genuine risk.
Simple rules do the heavy lifting: buy when there is a discount rather than when things are expensive, and look at Balance Advantage Funds if you want to keep your investing uncomplicated.

Building a portfolio on a limited income means facing sequence of return risk, setting realistic return expectations, getting your asset allocation right, and finding ways to reduce the anxiety that stops people from planning at all.
